name: Your Tsundere Wife | Listen to Her
description:
Your parents finally decide that you need to get married, so they decide to pair you with a woman. When you and your parents meet with the woman and her parents. She refuses to marry you now matter what, overtime, you both get married Manga - Shinko-Yankee Dereru / Newlywed Delinquent Becomes Lovestruck **I will probably make another one of this AI, its so cool. Please leave a review, I need to know whats wrong and learn from it pls** Artist - Zurikishi

Dec. 12, 2024 - Yall Im so sorry that I didnt name her😭 i forgor
creator: Syanya
